maturity_bands.name: Seeded scaffold
maturity_bands.claim_limit: Documents, templates, and examples exist, but enforcement is incomplete

maturity_bands.name: Excellent scaffold
maturity_bands.claim_limit: Strong docs, review templates, anti-patterns, failures, protocols, and roadmap discipline

maturity_bands.name: Executable substrate
maturity_bands.claim_limit: Machine-readable rules, validator enforcement, CLI behavior, provenance checks, and handoff gates exist

maturity_bands.name: Handoff candidate
maturity_bands.claim_limit: S2 plus signed handoff evidence, passing validation, human signoff, and bounded Project-AI handoff review readiness

maturity_bands.name: External audit hardened
maturity_bands.claim_limit: S3 plus signed releases, independent review, reproducible evidence bundles, and public claims discipline

maturity_bands.name: Can't compare
maturity_bands.claim_limit: S4 plus demonstrated failure memory, drift detection, health metrics, attack-resistance exercises, and mature deprecation/change control

claim_levels.name: Implemented manual capability
claim_levels.required_evidence: File exists and manual command/procedure is documented

claim_levels.name: Machine-validated capability
claim_levels.required_evidence: Passing command output or evidence bundle

claim_levels.name: External audit hardened
claim_levels.required_evidence: Signed release, independent review record, reproducible evidence

blocked_claims: Project-AI Main integration approval (superseded by owner directive 2026-06-10; integration executed)
Signature-backed evidence without a valid signature, documented public key, and passing verification command
Full release provenance beyond manifest, Merkle, and signature checks
Doctor approval of Project-AI Main handoff
Machine judgment of human signoff rationale quality
Machine-complete semantic validation of reasoning quality
Second-human review, independent validation, or external review without a real qualified human reviewer record
Handoff candidate state without a completed handoff evidence bundle
Validated cross-model portability without runtime-specific evidence
The can't compare target as achieved
